title: VD Satheesan sworn in as Kerala Chief Minister
content:
🏛️ Congress Leader Takes Oath in Kerala

👤 Who → VD Satheesan

📋 What → Sworn in as the 13th Chief Minister of Kerala

📍 Where → Kerala, India

🎯 Purpose → Formation of new government after UDF return to power

📌 Important Facts
▪️ Administered by Governor Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar
▪️ UDF returned to power after 10 years

⚠️ Exam Angle → 13th CM of Kerala and the name of the Governor are key for state exams

#19May2026

question: Who was sworn in as the 13th Chief Minister of Kerala?
options: A) Pinarayi Vijayan
B) VD Satheesan
C) Oommen Chandy
D) K. Sudhakaran
answer: B) VD Satheesan
explanation: VD Satheesan was sworn in as the 13th CM of Kerala after UDF returned to power after 10 years. Oath administered by Governor Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar.

question: Who assumed charge as the CEO of UIDAI in May 2026?
options: A) Bhuvnesh Kumar
B) Amitabh Kant
C) Saurabh Vijay
D) Rajiv Kumar
answer: C) Saurabh Vijay
explanation: Saurabh Vijay assumed charge as CEO of UIDAI. UIDAI functions under the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology and manages India's Aadhaar system.

question: The Grand Cross of the Royal Norwegian Order of Merit conferred on PM Modi was his how many-th international honour?
options: A) 28th
B) 30th
C) 35th
D) 32nd
answer: D) 32nd
explanation: PM Modi was conferred with the Grand Cross of the Royal Norwegian Order of Merit during the first visit by a sitting Indian PM to Norway in 43 years. It was his 32nd international honour.

question: What percentage stake did Prudential agree to acquire in Bharti Life Insurance?
explanation: Prudential plc agreed to acquire 75% stake in Bharti Life Insurance for an initial cash consideration of ₹3,500 crore. This was the first major deal after 100% FDI in insurance was allowed.

question: What is the theme of World Bee Day 2026?
options: A) Save the Bees, Save the World
B) Bee Together for People and the Planet - A Partnership that Sustains Us All
C) Bees and Biodiversity: Our Shared Future
D) Pollinate the Planet
answer: B) Bee Together for People and the Planet - A Partnership that Sustains Us All
explanation: World Bee Day is observed on May 20. The 2026 theme is 'Bee Together for People and the Planet'. It also marks the birth anniversary of Anton Jansa, a pioneer in beekeeping.

question: Which Small Finance Bank inaugurated India's first AI-powered 'phygital' banking branch in Guwahati?
options: AU Small Finance Bank
Equitas Small Finance Bank
Slice Small Finance Bank
Capital Small Finance Bank
explanation: Assam CM inaugurated India's 1st AI phygital branch of Slice SFB in Guwahati, featuring self-service kiosks and paperless cash transactions. #17May2026

question: Who was appointed as the Chairperson of the Committee on Empowerment of Women by Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla?
options: Smt. Droupadi Murmu
Dr. Daggubati Purandeswari
Smt. Nirmala Sitharaman
Smt. Smriti Irani
explanation: Om Birla formed a 28-member panel on Women Empowerment chaired by MP Dr. Daggubati Purandeswari to strengthen welfare mechanisms. #17May2026

question: Which opposition MP was recently nominated by President Edgars Rinkevics as the next Prime Minister of Latvia?
options: A) Krisjanis Karins
B) Evika Silina
C) Andris Kulbergs
D) Edvards Smiltens
answer: C) Andris Kulbergs
explanation: Latvian President Edgars Rinkevics nominated opposition MP Andris Kulbergs from the United List party as the next Prime Minister following constitutional authority. #17May2026

question: The Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Amendment Ordinance, 2026, has increased the sanctioned strength of Supreme Court judges to how many (excluding the CJI)?
explanation: President Murmu approved an increase in Supreme Court judges from 33 to 37 (excluding the CJI) via an ordinance under Article 123 to address case backlogs. #17May2026

content:
📈 *ECONOMY | India’s GDP Growth Projected at 7%*

🔹 IMF projected India’s GDP growth at 7% for FY 2026
🔹 India remains fastest-growing major economy

📌 *Static GK:* IMF HQ → Washington D.C.

#GDP #Economy

question: Brajesh Kumar Singh was recently appointed as MD and CEO of Canara Bank. Which bank was he serving as Executive Director before this appointment, and what is his tenure end date?
options: A) Bank of Baroda — 30 June 2028
B) Indian Bank — 30 April 2029
C) Punjab National Bank — 31 March 2028
D) Union Bank of India — 30 April 2028
answer: B) Indian Bank — 30 April 2029
explanation: Brajesh Kumar Singh was Executive Director of Indian Bank before being appointed MD & CEO of Canara Bank (HQ: Bengaluru). Tenure: till 30 April 2029 (superannuation). He succeeds K. Satyanarayana Raju. Bank of Baroda, PNB, Union Bank are distractors from the PSB space. #02June2026

question: Vice Admiral Vineet McCarty assumed charge as the 20th Commander-in-Chief of the Andaman and Nicobar Command (ANC). Which of the following statements about ANC is INCORRECT?
options: A) ANC was established in 2001
B) Its headquarters is at Sri Vijaya Puram
C) It is India's first and only Integrated Theatre Command
D) It operates under the exclusive command of the Indian Navy
answer: D) It operates under the exclusive command of the Indian Navy
explanation: ANC is NOT exclusively under the Navy — it is an Integrated Theatre Command where Army, Navy, and Air Force work under ONE commander for a geographical/operational objective. Established 2001, HQ: Sri Vijaya Puram. Vineet McCarty succeeded Vice Admiral Ajay Kochhar (became Vice Chief of Naval Staff). #02June2026

question: Defence Secretary Rajesh Kumar Singh was given additional charge of DRDO Chairman. Why was this additional charge necessitated?
options: A) The previous Chairman resigned citing personal reasons
B) The extended tenure of incumbent DRDO Chairman Samir V Kamat ended
C) The post was vacant due to the elevation of previous Chairman to Cabinet rank
D) DRDO was merged with the Ministry of Defence under a restructuring order
answer: B) The extended tenure of incumbent DRDO Chairman Samir V Kamat ended
explanation: The additional charge was given because the extended tenure of incumbent DRDO Chairman Samir V Kamat ended. DRDO (est. 1958, HQ: New Delhi) functions under Ministry of Defence. Resignation, Cabinet elevation, and restructuring are fabricated distractors. #02June2026

question: India's IIP grew 4.9% in April 2026. What makes this data release uniquely significant compared to previous months?
options: A) It is the first IIP data released under base year 2004-05
B) It is the first IIP data released under base year 2011-12
C) It is the first IIP data released under new base year 2022-23
D) It is the first IIP data released under base year 2017-18
answer: C) It is the first IIP data released under new base year 2022-23
explanation: April 2026 IIP (4.9% growth) is the first data released under the new base year 2022-23, replacing the old 2011-12 series. Released by MoSPI. The new series expanded the item basket to 463 items. Base years 2004-05, 2011-12, and 2017-18 are distractors referencing older or non-existent revisions. #02June2026

question: GST collection for May 2026 was ₹1.94 lakh crore. Which month recorded the all-time high GST collection and what was that figure?
options: A) March 2026 — ₹1.78 lakh crore
B) January 2026 — ₹1.93 lakh crore
C) April 2026 — ₹2.43 lakh crore
D) February 2026 — ₹1.83 lakh crore
answer: C) April 2026 — ₹2.43 lakh crore
explanation: April 2026 recorded the all-time high GST collection of ₹2.43 lakh crore (8.7% YoY growth). May 2026 was ₹1.94 lakh crore (3.2% YoY). Chart data: Jan ₹1.93L, Feb ₹1.83L, Mar ₹1.78L, Apr ₹2.43L, May ₹1.94L (est). All other months are distractors using actual chart values. #02June2026

question: UPI hit a record high in May 2026 with 23.2 billion transactions. NPCI, which oversees UPI, is a joint initiative of which two bodies?
options: A) SEBI and Ministry of Finance
B) RBI and Indian Banks' Association (IBA)
C) RBI and NITI Aayog
D) Ministry of Finance and DPIIT
answer: B) RBI and Indian Banks' Association (IBA)
explanation: NPCI (National Payments Corporation of India) is a joint initiative of RBI and the Indian Banks' Association (IBA). It is an umbrella body for retail payment & settlement systems. UPI processed 23.2 billion transactions worth ₹29.90 lakh crore in May 2026 — a record high. SEBI, NITI Aayog, DPIIT have no role in NPCI's establishment. #02June2026

question: IRDAI imposed a ₹1 crore penalty on Nissan Renault Financial Services India. What is the classification of this entity and why was it penalised?
options: A) Insurance Broker — for mis-selling life insurance policies
B) Corporate Agent — for violations of motor insurance regulations
C) Third-Party Administrator — for delay in claim settlement
D) Reinsurance Company — for capital adequacy violations
answer: B) Corporate Agent — for violations of motor insurance regulations
explanation: Nissan Renault Financial Services India is a Corporate Agent — an entity licensed by IRDAI to sell insurance products on behalf of insurers. Penalised ₹1 crore for violating motor insurance regulations. IRDAI est. 1999, HQ: Hyderabad. Broker, TPA, and Reinsurer are separate IRDAI-regulated categories. #02June2026

question: Mahindra Manulife Insurance Ltd (MMIL) was recently incorporated. Which foreign entity is the joint venture partner of Mahindra Group in MMIL?
options: A) Prudential Financial — USA
B) Allianz SE — Germany
C) Manulife Financial Corporation — Canada
D) Sun Life Financial — Canada
answer: C) Manulife Financial Corporation — Canada
explanation: MMIL is a JV between Mahindra Group (India) and Manulife Financial Corporation (Canada). Certificate of Incorporation was granted by MCA. Sun Life is also Canadian — a deliberate distractor. Prudential (USA) and Allianz (Germany) are other global insurance giants unrelated to this JV. #02June2026

question: Malaysia enforced regulations barring under-16s from social media on 1 June 2026. Which country was the FIRST to enforce a nationwide social media ban for children under 16?
options: A) United Kingdom
B) France
C) Australia
D) Norway
answer: C) Australia
explanation: Australia was the first country to actually enforce a nationwide social media ban for children under 16 — not Malaysia. Malaysia followed by enforcing similar rules from 1 June 2026. UK, France, and Norway have discussed similar measures but were not the first to enforce. This is a classic 'first vs. recent' exam trap. #02June2026

question: India-Oman CEPA was operationalised on 1 June 2026. What percentage of India's exports by value has Oman granted duty-free access to, and what share of Oman's tariff lines does the concession cover?
options: A) 95.50% of India's exports — 90.00% of Oman's tariff lines
B) 99.38% of India's exports — 98.08% of Oman's tariff lines
C) 97.20% of India's exports — 95.60% of Oman's tariff lines
D) 100% of India's exports — 99.00% of Oman's tariff lines
answer: B) 99.38% of India's exports — 98.08% of Oman's tariff lines
explanation: Under India-Oman CEPA (operationalised 1 June 2026), Oman granted duty-free access to 99.38% of India's exports by value, covering 98.08% of Oman's tariff lines. CEPA = Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement. The other percentage combinations are fabricated distractors designed to test precision recall. #02June2026

question: BHASHINI signed an agreement with DPIIT. DPIIT functions under which ministry, and what is the primary objective of this collaboration?
options: A) Ministry of Electronics and IT — to develop AI chips for India
B) Ministry of Commerce and Industry — to strengthen multilingual digital capabilities across industry and trade
C) Ministry of Science and Technology — to launch a multilingual search engine
D) Ministry of Education — to digitise school textbooks in regional languages
answer: B) Ministry of Commerce and Industry — to strengthen multilingual digital capabilities across industry and trade
explanation: DPIIT (Dept. for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade) functions under Ministry of Commerce and Industry. The BHASHINI-DPIIT agreement aims to strengthen multilingual digital capabilities across India's industry and trade ecosystem via BHASHINI Platform. MeitY, not DPIIT, is under Electronics & IT. #02June2026

question: The Ministry of Jal Shakti and ISRO signed an MoU for space-based water management. In the same event, which phase of the Jal Sanchay Jan Bhagidari (JSJB) Campaign was launched and what is the target?
options: A) Phase 1 — 50 lakh water conservation structures by March 2026
B) Phase 2 — 1 crore water conservation structures by December 2026
C) Phase 3 — 2 crore water conservation structures between June 2026 and May 2027
D) Phase 4 — 5 crore water conservation structures by 2030
answer: C) Phase 3 — 2 crore water conservation structures between June 2026 and May 2027
explanation: Union Jal Shakti Minister C.R. Patil launched Phase 3 of JSJB Campaign targeting 2 crore water conservation structures between June 2026 and May 2027. The Bharat WIN Platform was also introduced. The ISRO-Jal Shakti MoU was signed at the National Workshop on R&D in the Water Sector, New Delhi. #02June2026

question: The MAHA-Water Mission was jointly launched by ANRF and Jal Shakti Ministry. What does 'MAHA' stand for, and what is the total programme outlay?
options: A) Mission for Advancement in High-Impact Areas — ₹500 crore
B) Mission for Agricultural Hydrology and Aquifer management — ₹300 crore
C) Mission for Advancement in High-Impact Areas — ₹200 crore
D) Mission for Advancement in Hydrology and Agriculture — ₹150 crore
answer: C) Mission for Advancement in High-Impact Areas — ₹200 crore
explanation: MAHA = Mission for Advancement in High-Impact Areas. Total outlay: ₹200 crore. Per-project grant for consortia: up to ₹20 crore. Launched by Dr. Jitendra Singh (MoS Science & Technology). ANRF = Anusandhan National Research Foundation. Other full-form expansions are fabricated distractors. #02June2026

question: India finished runner-up at the 22nd Asian Under-20 Athletics Championships 2026. Which Indian athlete set a new senior national record in their event, and what was the record-breaking mark?
options: A) Nitin Gupta — 5000m race walk with a new timing record
B) Mogali Venkatram — 800m with a new national record timing
C) Pooja Singh — Women's high jump with 1.93m
D) Jyothi Yarraji — Women's 100m hurdles with a new national record
answer: C) Pooja Singh — Women's high jump with 1.93m
explanation: Pooja Singh won gold in women's high jump with 1.93m — a new senior national record. Nitin Gupta won men's 5000m race walk (India's first gold). Mogali Venkatram won men's 800m gold. India finished 2nd overall: 10G-5S-4B (19 medals) at Hong Kong. World U-20 Athletics: Eugene, Oregon, USA (5-9 Aug). #02June2026

question: India's first DORIS Ground Beacon was established at IIT Kanpur. DORIS was developed by which country and what does the acronym stand for?
options: A) USA — Digital Orbital Radio Interference Satellite System
B) Russia — Doppler Orbital and Radio-Integrated Satellite
C) France — Doppler Orbitography and Radio-positioning Integrated by Satellite
D) Japan — Differential Orbital Radio-positioning Integrated System
answer: C) France — Doppler Orbitography and Radio-positioning Integrated by Satellite
explanation: DORIS = Doppler Orbitography and Radio-positioning Integrated by Satellite. Developed by France. India's first DORIS Ground Beacon was established at IIT Kanpur, making it part of the global DORIS network. It provides centimetre-level accuracy in satellite tracking. USA, Russia, Japan are plausible but incorrect developers. #02June2026

question: India issued a Letter of Request (LoR) to France for 114 Rafale fighter jets. Which of the following correctly describes the Rafale aircraft?
options: A) 5th Generation stealth aircraft manufactured by Airbus, France
B) 4.5 Generation Multi-Role Fighter Aircraft by Dassault Aviation, France
C) 4th Generation aircraft manufactured by BAE Systems, UK
D) 5.5 Generation aircraft jointly developed by India and France under MMRCA
answer: B) 4.5 Generation Multi-Role Fighter Aircraft by Dassault Aviation, France
explanation: Rafale is a 4.5 Generation Multi-Role Fighter Aircraft manufactured by Dassault Aviation, France. The LoR covers 114 jets in a G2G deal worth ~₹3.25 lakh crore. India earlier procured 36 Rafales. Airbus (civil aviation) and BAE Systems (British) are common distractors; it is NOT stealth or 5th Gen. #02June2026

question: BRO celebrated the 37th Raising Day of Project UDAYAK at Doomdooma, Assam. In which year was Project UDAYAK originally raised and which region does it serve?
options: A) 1985 — Western Ladakh and Siachen Glacier
B) 1990 — Far-eastern region, strategic roads in eastern Arunachal Pradesh
C) 1995 — Northern Uttarakhand and Himachal Pradesh
D) 2001 — Northeast India including Meghalaya and Nagaland
answer: B) 1990 — Far-eastern region, strategic roads in eastern Arunachal Pradesh
explanation: Project UDAYAK was raised on 1 June 1990 as part of BRO's restructuring to focus on the far-eastern region. It handles strategic road and bridge infrastructure in eastern Arunachal Pradesh. 37th Raising Day (2026 - 1990 + 1 = 37). Ladakh, Uttarakhand, and Meghalaya options are fabricated distractors. #02June2026

question: World Milk Day is observed on June 1 every year. Which United Nations body established it and in which year was it founded?
options: A) WHO — 1998
B) UNICEF — 2005
C) FAO — 2001
D) WFP — 2000
answer: C) FAO — 2001
explanation: World Milk Day was established by the Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO) of the United Nations in 2001, observed every June 1 to recognise the importance of milk globally. WHO (health), UNICEF (children), WFP (food programme) are all UN bodies — designed as plausible distractors. #02June2026

question: Veteran playback singer Suman Kalyanpur recently passed away. Which of the following is one of her most well-known songs?
options: A) Lag Ja Gale
B) Aajkal Tere Mere Pyaar Ke Charche
C) Tere Bina Zindagi Se Koi
D) Piya Tose Naina Laage Re
answer: B) Aajkal Tere Mere Pyaar Ke Charche
explanation: Suman Kalyanpur, renowned veteran playback singer, passed away recently. Her iconic songs include 'Aajkal Tere Mere Pyaar Ke Charche', 'Na Na Karke Pyaar', and 'Tumne Pukara Aur Hum Chale Aaye'. The other options are famous songs by Lata Mangeshkar — a deliberate distractor given Suman Kalyanpur was often compared to Lata ji. #02June2026
